mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (user_id, vehicle_id, space_id, start_time, end_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{vehicleId}, #{spaceId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, space_id, start_time, end_time, status, create_time FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, space_id, start_time, end_time, status, create_time FROM reservation ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, vehicle_id, space_id, start_time, end_time, status, create_time FROM reservation WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'USING') AND NOT (end_time <= #{startTime} OR start_time >= #{endTime})
